{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Maret
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Maret]] climbed up [[Ziel]]'s hair and rested on his skull.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
